title: Patient Experience
subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Read what our patients have to say about their Luxe Dental experience.

comforts.title: Curated Comforts
comforts.subtitle: Every detail of our space has been carefully selected to alleviate anxiety and promote relaxation.

suites.title: Private Suites
suites.desc: Spacious, acoustically isolated rooms designed to ensure complete privacy and a serene environment free from typical clinical noise.

blankets.title: Weighted Blankets
blankets.desc: Experience the calming, grounding effect of our premium weighted blankets, and immerse yourself in curated playlists with noise-canceling headphones.

lounge.title: Refreshment Lounge
lounge.desc: Arrive early to enjoy artisanal teas, sparkling water, and warm scented towels in our dedicated relaxation lounge.

tech.title: Precision Meets Comfort
tech.subtitle: We invest in the world's most advanced dental technology not just for clinical excellence, but to make your experience faster, less invasive, and entirely comfortable.

scan.title: Digital 3D Scanning
scan.desc: Say goodbye to uncomfortable impression material. Our precision scanners create perfect digital models in minutes.

laser.title: Laser Dentistry
laser.desc: Quiet, virtually painless procedures with significantly reduced recovery times compared to traditional methods.

crowns.title: Single-Visit Crowns
crowns.desc: On-site milling technology allows us to design, create, and place premium restorations in a single appointment.
